claw_coder_latest.query: assembly x86_64 simple TCP server socket that listens on port 8080 and echoes back received data
claw_coder_latest.result:
Saved: assembly_x86_64_simple_TCP_server_socket_that_list_20260502_000656.asm | Validation: No validator for assembly

```asm
; x86_64 Linux TCP Echo Server (Port 8080)
; Requires: nasm, ld, gcc for linking

section .data
    port equ 8080
    backlog equ 5
    buf_size equ 4096
    
    ; Socket constants (sys/socket.h)
    AF_INET equ 2
    SOCK_STREAM equ 1
    IPPROTO_TCP equ 6
    SOL_SOCKET equ 1
    SO_REUSEADDR equ 2
    
    ; System call numbers
    SYS_SOCKET equ 41
    SYS_BIND equ 4
